summary: Iteration 268: P0 Infrastructure Stability Fix - All features verified working. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: Input Phase, Story Preview, Admin Dashboard all working. Auto-resume from checkpoint, fallback asset generation, crash diagnostics logging, and enhanced error recovery UI fully functional.

issues: Cookie consent banner overlays content initially - minor UX issue, does not block functionality

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/pipeline/create creates new jobs successfully with credits deduction
VERIFIED: GET /api/pipeline/status/{job_id} returns has_recoverable_assets flag correctly
VERIFIED: GET /api/pipeline/status/{job_id} returns crash_logs array with server restart info
VERIFIED: GET /api/pipeline/status/{job_id} returns fallback data with story_pack_url and has_preview
VERIFIED: GET /api/pipeline/preview/{job_id} works for PARTIAL jobs, returns scenes with images/audio
VERIFIED: POST /api/pipeline/resume/{job_id} requires authentication (returns 401/403 for unauthorized)
VERIFIED: GET /api/pipeline/crash-diagnostics returns crash data (admin only, 403 for non-admin)
VERIFIED: GET /api/pipeline/user-jobs includes has_recoverable_assets flag for each job
VERIFIED: GET /api/pipeline/options returns animation_styles, age_groups, voice_presets, credit_costs
VERIFIED: GET /api/pipeline/rate-limit-status returns can_create, recent_count, concurrent info
VERIFIED: GET /api/pipeline/workers/status returns worker pool statistics
VERIFIED: Frontend ErrorPhase shows 'Open Preview' button when hasAnyAssets is true (data-testid='view-assets-btn')
VERIFIED: Frontend ErrorPhase shows 'Download Story Pack ZIP' button when fallback.story_pack_url exists (data-testid='download-zip-btn')
VERIFIED: Frontend ErrorPhase shows 'Resume from Checkpoint' button (data-testid='resume-btn')
VERIFIED: Frontend ErrorPhase shows 'Start Over' button (data-testid='new-video-btn-error')
VERIFIED: Frontend ErrorPhase shows special message for server restart interruptions
VERIFIED: Story Preview page shows 'Your story assets are ready' banner with 3 options (Instant Preview, Export MP4, Story Pack ZIP)
VERIFIED: Story Preview shows scenes with images and audio, downloads section with Story Pack (ZIP)

FEATURE_7_ERROR_PHASE_UI.server_restart_message: The process was interrupted, but your completed assets have been saved. You can resume or view what was generated.

seed_data_creation: Created one new test job (86c73ae4) during test_create_returns_job_id test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 268: P0 Infrastructure Stability Fix fully verified. All 8 features tested and working: (1) Pipeline create works with credits deduction. (2) Status endpoint includes has_recoverable_assets and crash_logs. (3) Preview endpoint works for PARTIAL jobs with full asset data. (4) Resume endpoint requires auth. (5) Crash diagnostics (admin only) shows 3 crashed jobs with detailed logs. (6) User jobs include has_recoverable_assets flag. (7) ErrorPhase UI has all 4 buttons (Open Preview, Download ZIP, Resume, Start Over) with server restart message. (8) Story Preview page shows asset recovery UI with 3 options. Note: Job 630278b5-4b2f-48b9-acf9-adabae24e3b0 from main agent context doesn't exist, but 630278b5-6a8e-4c7a-82af-cb440dbe87a9 does.
